name: Find Pair: Attention Memory
description: It is an exciting game that will help you relax and train your brain at the same time. Your task is to find identical pictures on the board. With each level, the game challenges you by limiting the number of moves. But dont worry! If it gets tough, you can always use hints or get extra moves. Game Features: Good for everyone: Great memory training for kids and adults. Exciting gameplay: Simple rules, but addictive process. Hint system: Use hints to reveal all cards for a few seconds.
instructions: Mouse click or tap to play
tags: free html5 games for your website
